description: getUserAttribute guards against prototype-chain traversal via hasOwnProperty; getInternalSetting and getStaticDefault index directly into the object.

findings.rationale: getUserAttribute guards the lookup with hasOwnProperty; the other two getters traverse the prototype chain. The guard is load-bearing on the user endpoint: an attacker-controlled key like "__proto__" reaches Object internals without it. Unifying onto a shared getter that drops the guard re-introduces prototype pollution.
